title: Digital Marketing Made Easy Starter Guide
audience: Beginners with little or no online business experience
Gen X professionals exploring additional income streams
Parents looking for flexible digital income options
Aspiring entrepreneurs interested in AI, digital marketing and affiliate marketing
chapters: The beginner map: what digital marketing really is
Choose a niche without getting stuck
Understand your audience and their buying journey
Build your first simple offer and funnel
Plan content that attracts and helps
compliancePosition: No unrealistic income claims. Results vary based on effort, skill, consistency, market demand and implementation. Affiliate relationships must be disclosed clearly.
